subcodes.first_line: O spiritual youth and friend in the Most Merciful Lord! That which was written to Jináb-i-Siyyid Taqí hath been noted and observed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان روحانی و الفتی الرحمانی آنچه بجناب سید تقی مرقوم گردید ملحوظ شد و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant, @being a source of light; guidance, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
